article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: Correct Right classification with strong, specific author-prose evidence in reasoning and appropriate high confidence. Minor issue: key_indicators rely partly on outlet identity and vague summaries rather than quoting the author's exact phrases.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article’s tone and framing clearly align with Right: denigrates TMZ, lauds Kid Rock, labels Bad Bunny 'rabidly anti-Trump,' alleges media manipulation.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Signals are overt and consistent; a 0.92 confidence is appropriate.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Reasoning cites author phrases ('tried its best,' 'frontloaded the poll,' 'rabidly anti-Trump'), but key_indicators include outlet identity and vague points instead of specific author wording.
